calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR#2031. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-20-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for short cause.

Appearances:
NEIL ISON, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Flora Ng
SUMMER M. SMITH, Esq. on behalf of defendants Constructive Works Group, Inc. and Nissam Lanyadoo

The parties settled after being sent to Judge Pro Tem. Terms of the settlement were as follows: Defendants are to pay plaintiff the sum of $15,000.00. CC 1542 waiver was stipulated to. The Court to retain jurisdiction to enforce the settlement pursuant to CCP 664.6. After the receipt of payment, the plaintiff will dismiss the case with prejudice.

Judge Robert L. Dondero; Clerks: Vera Mu/JIRoque; Reporter: Rita Howell #2542 (206)
